channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Who's still buying BTC at this level? — 84 replies — 336.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who's still buying BTC at this level?

Open thread • Replies: 84 • Updated: 2026-07-21 20:04 UTC

OP

BTC has already come a long way. Are you still buying here, waiting for a pullback, or just holding what you already have?

>Curious what everyone's plan is.

Early replies (first 3)

62475243
waiting for $10k and I will buy 3 btc

62475257
>>62475235
YOUR MOTHER

62475258
>>62475235
I'm DCAing bitcoin at the second half of the midterm year.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62494846
>>62490309
It's easy to throw out price targets. Explaining why bitcoin will actually get there is the hard part.

62495219
>>62494434
How great?

62495227
>>62489716
What are you thinking there joe

62495280
.

62495641
>>62480931
buy 2 btc

62495924
>>62475235
I'm buying more, If I eventually need liquidity, I might lend later when TBV is live
>>62475971
There will never be 10K

62496666
>>62495924
you sure about that? it might go zero ?

62496951
>>62495641
slowly

62497289
>>62486528
great job man

62497294
Its very interesting to see the current transition of this board from being a crypto board to becoming a stock market board.
More and more anons slowly realizing crypto potential gains just arent there anymore and we might even be in a secular bear market.
If stock start crashing, crypto will have the biggest bear that it has ever seen.

62498541
>>62497294
It's the best time to accumulate then

62498999
>>62475235
bullish

62500137
>>62491816
How do you do that?

62500294
>>62500137
You can check the 200 week moving average on trading view, we are currently holding it as support. Any purchases below that average have given great returns.

62500310
>>62475235
Checked out sitting on mostly cash with about 20% in it right now.
Setting a significant buy order at 55k, if it drops a lot more I'll FOMO whatever I can otw down.
If that doesn't happen, I'll start DCAing again in mid/late September and begin incrementing the DCA in Nov.
If none of this makes sense, who cares, this is what my retard brain is telling me is a good plan.

62501164
>>62500294
Still not a guarantee

62501169
>>62475258
Never forget that Ben took his sexy assistant to Michael Saylor's 100k party, and not his wife.

62501528
>>62484050
I like your approach...

62501530
>>62501169
If you have that money, you can do that

62501533
>>62501169
this is why dating the ugly dork as a woman doesnt even work

he will cheat on you as soon as he can like any other man

62501560
>>62501533
Money speaks

62501981
>>62500310
You're smart

62502237
kek

62502257
>>62501164
There's no such thing as a guarantee when it comes to investment.

62503437
>>62502257
As always...

62503861
Bitcoin isn't going to survive long term. Its the most technologically challenged coin and has the most complex problem to overcome with Y2Q (post quantum). POW cant stop quantum computers from minning, POS can. Bitcoin has to defend from two fronts and big upgrades isn't what the project is know for. It took Eth 5 years to switch their consensus to POS and Eth has 3 times more active developers than Bitcoin, so good luck bitchuds Y2Q is will proceed on April 14, 2030.

62504863
>>62503861
Are you sure?

62504896
>>62476239
Always?
In 2020 he said BTC wouldn't reach 20k until 2022 or early 2023. In 2021 he said ETH would reach at least 10k before the bear market. In late 2021 he said the absolute bottom target for the bear market was $40k BTC. Don't forget all his videos shilling ADA with $10 ADA clickbait titles.

62506524
>>62504896
It's easy to say something

62506580
still DCA'ing

item.title: Why's everyone so salty about BTC? — 31 replies — 91.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why's everyone so salty about BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-07-21 19:56 UTC

OP

It's always the people who don't even hold any BTC doing the most FUD.

>Meanwhile, the actual holders are just chilling. Why is that?

Early replies (first 3)

62502227
(((They))) are trying to offload AI bags by fudding everything else.

62502236
>>62502227
no problem if they shill but why the fud?

62502240
>>62502236
Saaar bitgoyimz baaad blady!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62502246
>>62502240
hello nigger

62502252
>>62502246
I send a group you bitchbasterrd!

62502261
>>62502252
wow indian

62502271
I fuckin missed out OK? I was too busy trying to get Occupy pussy and I fucking missed it.

62502274
>>62502271
Buy the dip boss

62502310
Real rich are silent.

62502325
>>62502209
>slow, censored, surveilled glownigger coin with no usecase
>hurrrr why do people not like it

62502326
>moon

62502354
>>62502325
Censored what?

62502443
>>62502325
Basturrd buy the spacex coin!

62502475
its down to 60k like it was years ago what a shitty outcome for you hahaha no growth lmao you suck at financial prowess

62502533
>>62502261
I call your mother sister a group. I fucking your dad in ass hole. Why you run like lady, eh?

62502749
>>62502240
Yes sar??!

62502846
>>62502209
I held 32 BTC from 2014 til it reached $107k. I will not buy any crypto again until BTC is delisted from every exchange.

62502947
>>62502209
OnlyFans?

62502988
>>62502533
A chinese indian, interesting...

62503000
>>62502325
being delusional will not change your reality

62503069
>>62502209
There's no way to know who is holding Bitcoin, you could be just larping too.

62503436
>>62502246
Lol..

62503480
>>62502846
Can you give me 1btc?

62504391
I'm buying

62504635
>>62502209
We need idiots to sell so we buy it for cheap, then hype it again in 3 years and sell it to a new wave of idiots

62504718
>>62504635
And you will only buy worth $10 hahahaa

62504813
people are usually the loudest when they have no skin in the game, but holders can also get too emotionally attached. Better to judge the thesis and risk objectively. I'm curious how Candora Agent will help analyze market sentiment once it launches.

62504841
its usually metalfags, they mistakenly believe that btc buyers would buy gold if btc didnt exist.
whenever gold dumps we get the most rabid attacks.

62505402
>>62504841
What else aside from gold?

62506531
>>62502947
What do you mean?

62506543
nocoiners are either butthurt they missed out on the facemelting gains or bought the top and panic sold the bottom and are now butthurt that they are retarded

item.title: What is the point? — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What is the point?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-07-21 20:15 UTC

OP

Sorry if this is too depressing for you guys, but I'm just struggling to understand.....the point of it all. What's the point of making money in 2026?

It literally feels like every single avenue is either already destroyed by AI or about to be in a very small, single digit number of years.

Develop a skill
>AI will eat your skill in <2 years

Get a degree (kek)
>AI will destroy the value of your degree in 0-2 years

Buy a bunch of equities
>AI will destroy the value of most companies very soon, to the extent these companies are even remotely valued correctly and are not extremely overbought and propped up only by American capitalism which is being destroyed in real time by China

Buy crypto
>AI will probably develop its own currency and has no interest in propping up your bags

Save for retirement
>are you fucking serious? You want me to bank on the value of United States Dollars LIKE FORTY YEARS from now?

Buy a house
>oh yeah let me put down ~20% and expect to be able to pay back the other 80% (plus interest, goy) when I don't even know whether my job category will still exist in 2 years......

WHAT THE FUCK AM I SUPPOSED TO DO WITH MY LIFE?

Early replies (first 3)

62506588
>>62506563
What is the point fucking ops mom anally guys?

62506590
>>62506563
>AI will replace everything in 2 years
Same shit was said in 2022. And 2023. And 2024. And 2025. And now in 2026.
2 more years.

You listen too much to salesmen peddling and hyping the product they are selling.

62506595
>>62506563
>>AI will destroy the value of your degree in 0-2 years
I mean, it's kinda already lost its value.

High-level education used to carry with it an elite status, where graduates where recognized as highly intelligent and skilled specialists.

Nowadays they purposely inflate their admissions with women and minorities. That should tell you right away that the value of the thing has been diminished.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62506597
>>62506563
if nothing else so you don't have to knuckle under when they apply pressure again, right?

62506602
>>62506590
Based on my own experience it is extremely helpful to the point where I have much less interest in, say, going to a doctor for anything less than major surgery, or any other knowledge-based profession.

You basically won't be able to sell "I know something you don't know" at all in the future, which is the basis for a huge percentage of jobs.

62506606
>>62506588
Based milf anal gaper

62506621
>>62506602
Just sounds like you haven't needed it for anything genuinely technical yet. AI is good at coding with handholding and it seems super smart surface level but it falls apart quickly when you need real world experience and some wit to solve a problem. Ai helps me with very very little with what I do in life. Only the most basic data management.

62506631
>>62506621
>genuinely technical
You know most people aren't "genuinely technical" right?

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-07-21 19:57 UTC

OP

Day 1772 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

62506472
>>62506464
I'm gonna be real with you guys, I went on vacation, got a gf, and all the autism is just draining out of me. Hopefully I can last till day 2000 at least.

62506511
>>62506472
so what happened with your gf after you went back home? exactly. your autism will be back in no time

62506546
>>62506511
Two isolated events, went on vacation, got gf back home. Both have contributed to a bit of a snail slump.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Everest MiCA CASP — 172 replies — 82.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Everest MiCA CASP

Open thread • Replies: 172 • Updated: 2026-07-21 18:12 UTC

OP

I want to personally thank every Everest ID hater in here, talking to you Link baggies. They secured MiCA CASP last week.

A single MFSA license is valid across 27 EU states, reaching ~450M people. Of the ~283 CASPs on the ESMA register, nearly all are exchanges or brokers. Everest is one of the rare licensed infrastructure providers: identity and payment rails, not another venue.

Enjoy it furries

Early replies (first 3)

62461998
>>62461988
I thought it would have mooned harder from the news. What gives

62462006
It is because we are meant to suffer as token holders just like the Linkies

62463131
>Unlisted from coingecko
Lmao!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62501683
>>62499407
realistic prediction?

62501718
>>62501683
Do you know how easy it is to scale what they have now? Dollars is easily within reach

62501779
In 2024 it ran to 40 cents and I think they are fundamentally stronger now with CASP; adding multiple EMI, banking, and card-processing partners in 2025. 2021 ATH is 2.28, I think it retests that at some point next few years, idk the ONLY thing is team does not advertise or market shit, that is only blocker imo. I think it’s a great DYOR. Very simple search Everest ID on X and go through team’s posts/newsletters. Founder Bob is also a relentless mfer who would love to give fat middle finger to all the haters last 5 years, to each their own

62502264
>>62501779
>the ONLY thing is team does not advertise or market shit

62502480
Kek I think that was from pilot partnership they had with Taco Bell. They also dipped their foot in DEI with Liza. Can’t wait to see what they come up with next

62502482
Try to apply to a job at Oracle Inc...exact same email sign in...wtf

62502537
>>62502482
Link?

62502561
I think he means this: https://signon.oracle.com/signin

It looks similar to Everest sign in but not enough for me to make any conclusions. I dug to death on this multiple times and found NOTHING regarding Everest and Oracle post 2021 so I am almost positive it is dead. Bob never explicitly confirmed one way or other but there would have to be even 1 or 2 cookie crumbs if someone deep dove as much as possible, I found nothing post 2021.

62502568
The only thing I found weird (likely pure coincidence) is Everchain randomly went private for “security reasons” then a few weeks later Oracle went live with the Financial Crime and Compliance Management Service that Everest said they partnered with them to build. Bobs Oracle contact left the next year so most likely nothing.

62502648
>>62502561
It is the exact same process and email notification with the same 6 digit confirmation process you high IQ retard. I'm not here to convince you.
You will find nothing because you are not supposed to.
Its a big club my friend, and you're not in it.

62502673
>>62502568
Bob said the explorer was taken down due to security issues.

Blockchain explorer transaction visibility into the Financial Crime and Compliance Management Service was the security issue.

There are no coincidences.

62502676
>>62502673
So it’s all been a ruse to keep it under the radar? You think this past “exploit” that brought ATL was staged as well to shake people out?

62502700
>>62502676
Basically.
It could have been a cover for large whale token movement preparing for a launch or tax loss harvesting... etc...
They had a major token movement event last April/May as well that matches the volume of this most recent event.

62502717
>>62502700
Damn. Hopefully the clarity act passes and maybe that’s what they are waiting for to finally let this thing run

62503011
>>62502717
Could be a huge catalyst...we shall see

62503426
There is no catalyst my friend. We sit at 1 cent for next 5 years and bull flag completes in 2032

62504047
>>62503011
Gonna be a slow pump til Q4 announcements.
~2 months left to get your bags packed.

62504138
>>62504047
ERC-3643? Right?

62504289
>>62504138
Who are you and what are you doing here?

62504823
>>62504289
Just someone who pays attention to the crumbs

62504930
What the hell is ERC-3643, holy crap yall are more schizophrenic than me lol

62504965
>>62503426
I'm not ready to wait another "5 years" for "another shitcoin". And why is it always 5 years? Can you benchods make it quicker?

62505036
There is a holder in bum fuck nowhere who put Bobs picture under a rock in his village because he lost 6 figures on ID. I’ve asked him twice nicely to remove the picture of Bob from underneath the rock and he starts ranting each time saying no, I think that is key to getting this going

62505107
>>62504930
Kek a so called Everest maxi and you couldn’t even put together ERC-3643

62505281
ERC-3643: The Compliance Standard for RWAs
ERC-3643 (also known as T-REX) is an open-source token standard originally developed by Tokeny (now part of Apex Group). It embeds compliance directly into tokens — KYC/AML checks, transfer restrictions, investor eligibility, clawbacks, etc. It’s designed for regulated security tokens and RWAs, making it easier for institutions to issue and manage compliant assets on public blockchains. stellar.org
Stellar’s Official Integration into ERC-3643
In 2025, the Stellar Development Foundation (SDF) formally joined the ERC3643 Association. This is a major move to extend the ERC-3643 compliance framework beyond EVM chains (like Ethereum/Polygon) to Stellar (via Soroban smart contracts).
Key goals:
• Support issuers bringing ERC-3643-compliant assets onto Stellar.
• Enable cross-chain interoperability between Stellar and Ethereum-based standards.
• Accelerate institutional RWA adoption with unified compliance tooling. stellar.org
Apex Group / Tokeny (the creators of ERC-3643) are deeply embedded in this ecosystem. Apex is a massive global fund administrator (servicing trillions in assets) and has committed to T-REX Ledger (a compliance layer tied to ERC-3643) as its default multi-chain infrastructure, with big tokenized asset targets.

62505284
>>62505281
This creates a standards bridge: Institutions using Apex/Tokeny tools for compliant issuance can now more easily deploy on Stellar (fast, cheap, payments-focused) while maintaining the same regulatory controls.
How This Connects to DTCC, Everest, and Europe/MiCA
• DTCC on Stellar (2027): Tokenized securities (stocks, ETFs, Treasuries) coming to Stellar. These are institutional-grade RWAs that need strong compliance for global distribution.
• ERC-3643 + Stellar: Provides the standardized compliance layer (investor rules, permissions) that makes DTCC-style assets easier to issue and manage on Stellar while being interoperable with other chains.
• Europe/MiCA: Stellar itself doesn’t need a MiCA license, but services to EU users do. MiCA-licensed players (like Everest) become the regulated on-ramps/wallets/custody solutions. Everest’s SCF Kickstart win and native Stellar wallet integration position it perfectly to serve European users accessing these compliant RWAs.
• Apex/Tokeny Role: As a major player in ERC-3643, Apex can act as (or partner with) issuance/transfer agents. Their tools + Stellar = scalable, compliant RWA infrastructure. Everest can integrate or complement this for end-user EU access.

62505518
>>62505284
>>62505281
https://stellar.org/press/stellar-development-foundation-joins-erc3643-association

62505940
>>62504823
Few, this is great insight. Lots of ID/Steller connections and ID basically provides the only truly decentralized input for any Identity frameworks

62506146
>>62505940
calling AI slop “great insight” is a choice

item.title: both Swift and DTCC are going live right now — 262 replies — 75.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
both Swift and DTCC are going live right now

Open thread • Replies: 262 • Updated: 2026-07-21 16:48 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62466455
Price?

62466457
>>62466455
Suppressed,

62466461
And literal top-buying turned full time fudders are finally capitulating.

Imagine subjecting yourself to all the pain and never seeing it through the end. I gave myself 6 months after SWIFT and DTCC are live to see if the token shoots up, and then decide wether to sell half my stack of just staking rewards.

But to sell RIGHT BEFORE the literal ANNOUNCED DATES of the two biggest financial behemoths' launches? That's crazy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62504197
>>62504170
stinkies always get so spiritual when they feel threatened
i guess religion truly is the opiate of the masses

62504595
>>62503805
>LINK zealot OP with 71 pbtid (a prolific deluded permabull)
Tell me one single thing I said itt that's even 1% deluded.

Swift and DTCC are going live; zero delusion about that.
The price of Link is in fact suppressed (intentionally or not); zero delusion about that.
All Chainlink products rely on the nodes, and the nodes can only be paid in Link; zero delusion about that.
etc.

In fact you have to be a deluded zealot to even try to deny these things.

62504810
>>62503805
who are you quoting bro? that guy ain't me and I have no idea what the hell you're talking about

62505047
>>62504810
You can click a person's id and look at their posts, anon. Should make it a bit easier for you to figure out what the hell is going on.

>>62504595
You do you friend, but pretty much every time I check in on /biz/ (which isn't much) I see you duking it out with verbose xrp schizo or some other chainlink obsessed fuddie, going around in circles endlessly. As far as I can tell, almost every day, for hours on end, posting the same "but swift, dtcc.... etc" or "btc made chainlink dump...". I'm not saying you are wrong, it's just insane to see how zealous you are. In my head you're of a similar archetype as the verbose xrp guy but, except not verbose.

62505058
>>62505047
hes an ai bro. You just pay for 4chan pass and let it run wild

62505142
>>62505058
AI or not, he's right

62505191
linkies are literally going insane xD

62505314
>>62505047
then why did you quote my id and asked me to answer a question from a different id? are you schizophrenic?

62505361
>>62505047
What takes zealotry is repeating the same lies 24/7 for years about an asset you hate.
Which is why only very few people are responsible for it (in large part even a single xerpie: Thomas/Adem/Verbo).

Talking about an asset you do hold for purely logical reasons takes exactly 0 zealotry.
Which is why almost every Linkie ever has taken part in refuting the fud, including you in this very thread.

62505395
>>62505361
when even your fellow bagholders begin to call you mentally ill, it is time to take a step back and reflect upon this, anon

62505412
>>62505395
Why are you even here?

62505495
>>62505314
I think you're confusing me for someone else, I just pointed out that a resident mentally ill person (the avatarfag fuddie) called you cringe. That was funny to me.

>>62505361
I agree it's infinitely weirder to obsessively attack something as innocuous as an investment than it is to defend your own bags, but that doesn't mean you can't be zealous when doing the latter. Zealotry is not restricted to being wrong either. To me you come across as overly zealous, the more I think about it the more I realise these retards are not worth our time. The only reason most of these thralls post here is because everyone over on Twatter blocked them and they require (negative) engagement to feed their twisted egos.

>>62505395
So you did understand what I was saying!

62505541
I can’t even read this dumpster fire of a thread. You cannot talk about Link on this board without your threads getting completely derailed and spammed. Its utterly insane.

62505551
>>62505541
linkies are literally going insane
feels good

62505593
>>62505495
and he would be wrong because I never samefagged!
then you quoted me specifically and added at the end of your post that I never responded to another post of yours that was replying to a completely different poster than me
are you ok little bro?

62505596
>>62503805
this is your post bro, I think you should stop getting high

62505597
>>62505495
>the more I think about it the more I realise these retards are not worth our time
two things:
For me, the fact that all of their Link fud is actually repackaged XRP fud is just too delicious to pass up.
Simply pointing this out makes them go absolutely ballistic.

62505613
>you are a mentally ill, obsessed retard on par with XRP morons
>XRP is worse hahahaha!
kek, this is hilarious at this point
the state of chainlink retards ladies and gents, their own benchmark is the most notorious shitcoin in the industry

62505625
>>62505541
you're not missing anything
>DTCC and SWIFT are about to begin the initial pre pre pre production trial soon™
>LINK is eternally suppressed
>tumor weeks
>XRP fucking sucks and linkies cannot stop thinking about it
that's pretty much the gist of this thread, you're welcome

62505628
>>62505613
But what is the state of you? You're obviously a part of this circus too, judging by the way you're addressing a nonexistent audience.

62505638
>>62505628
>you CANNOT mock my deranged shitposting!
s-s-sorry dude, I'll stop

62505645
>>62505628
you never addressed these btw>>62505593
>>62505596
and please notice how I actually quoted your own id, kek

62505646
>>62505638
>I-I-I-I-I'm just here to mock!

You're obviously butthurt af

62505652
>>62505646
pot meet kettle, mister 10 thousand gazillion pbtid across multiple days
lol, lmao even
you forgot to call me a samefag, don't get sloppy now

62505659
This thread is like being in a kindergarten full of adults who got held back indefinitely

62505664
>>62505659
every chainlink thread in a nutshell

62505676
>>62505652
>pot meet kettle
I'm not here to mock anyone, and I never got butthurt. We couldn't be more different.
Also I'm a pot in the kitchen, you're a rake who simply doesn't belong here.

So let me ask you again: why are you here?

62505677
>>62505625
>DTCC and SWIFT are about to begin the initial production
>LINK was suppressed, intentionally or not
>tumor years
>XRPs cannot stop thinking about LINKs

FIXED for you

62505883
>>62505664
Aye man FUCK YOU

62505896
>>62505664
>t. one of the adults in the kindergarten

item.title: So how much can we expect for the next BTC bullrun? — 33 replies — 21.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
So how much can we expect for the next BTC bullrun?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-07-21 18:43 UTC

OP

So how much can we expect for the next BTC bullrun? Could we get a 3x at least?

Early replies (first 3)

62488594
>>62488572
110k top

62488607
Doubling time will double unless it turns into a double sigmoid.

62488619
>>62488572
I don't like my girl barefoot because then they're dirty and I can't lick them at a moments notice

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62488660
>>62488572
It depends on rates and liquidity, something /biz/ constantly ignores, even though it's the main catalyst for the price of Bitcoin.

62488665
It will be a 5x
From 20k to 100k
No ATH will be broken next run.

62488784
>>62488572
$1,000,000 at least

62491087
>>62488572
How does 250k sound?

62491165
>>62488572
5% under saylor avg price.

62491396
>>62488572
No, BTC is going literally to zero. People will laugh and the industry will be humiliated but we eventually recover without BTC. I'm talking completely stalled chain and delisted from every exchange.

62491405
>>62491087
Was thinking close to this memed up

62491425
Epstein pedo coin fee machine

62491426
>>62488572
Depends on if the banana peel pattern finally breaks out (blue lines)
If not, the top will be about 145k in 2028. However, eventually these lines will converge. It’s just a matter of whether it breaks out this cycle or next.
Oh and bottom is in by the way.

62491754
>>62491426
US and global semiconductors are imploding, GOOG rugged 4% today, and we haven’t even invaded Iran yet, and it’s not even September yet, and it’s not even midterms yet, and Trump is making it clear he’s going to declare an emergency to make sure Republicans win midterms.


Ahh…


So in what world do you see us appreciating in the next few months?

62496031
>>62488572
3X is very possible
>>62491396
No its not, we can see more trend around lending with TBV integrating with AAVE, BTC will hit 200K

62496038
>>62488665
This, but $80k top in 2029.
Law of diminishing return + dome theory.

62496054
Why would anyone buy crypto it’s all scams and meme coins now

Dead tech no one wants

62496175
>>62488572
At 21 she hates the idea of getting pregnant
In 20 years she'll be seething online that her divorced ex won't get back with her and she wants to make a test tube baby from her frozen eggs

62497340
>>62491396
Trash like BSV, BCH, ETC, and many other shitcoins are still alive, even though no one, even the worst shills, believes in them anymore. BTC is widely used as a store of wealth and means of barter, from nation states to corporations, to banks, and to wealthy individuals.
I'm not even a maxi, I believe there will eventually be a flippening, but it doesn't mean BTC will die.

62497349
>>62496031
>Could we get a 3x at least?

Sure from the EOY bottom at 20k!!!

62497610
>>62488572
>the next BTC bullrun

62497625
ONE HUNDRED AND SEVENTY FIVE THOUSAND DOLLARIDOOS JUST DO NOT ADJUST FOR INFLATION

62497653
>war in Iran escalates to the point where oil infrastructure is destroyed to the point where it will take years to rebuild
>GCC countries stop buying US bonds
>The fed is forced to print and buy its own debt
>hyperinflation begins, everyone goes to the bank to take out their money, the whole system collapses
>both PM and BTC do a 100x by the end of the year as they absorb wealth running away from the fiat collapse

It's literally your last chance to buy

62497982
>>62497653
>both PM and BTC do a 100x by the end of the year as they absorb wealth running away from the fiat collapse
you guys never learn

62498222
>>62497653
They'll do 100x but the USD will be worth 1000x less. You'll have to bring wheelbarrows of cash to afford a single mcdonalds hashbrown.

62498473
>>62491754
>So in what world do you see us appreciating in the next few months?

62500829
>>62496175

Nah, most of them are too lazy to go through with freezing an egg until it's too late.

62500937

They only thing I can learn from woman is massive hate and jealousy and the desire to abortion no matter how high their education is.

62501443
>>62488572

62502910

62505657

62506216

item.title: As I was saying yesterday. The Chinese are slowly giving the news to trading partners. No more dollars. You want to buy… — 101 replies — 17.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
As I was saying yesterday. The Chinese are slowly giving the news to trading partners. No more dollars. You want to buy…

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-07-21 14:20 UTC

OP

As I was saying yesterday. The Chinese are slowly giving the news to trading partners. No more dollars. You want to buy from us. You get a Yuan swap line. You settle trade imbalances in gold or Yuan and use our settlement systems.

What can the US do? All they have is threats against the likes of Argentina. China has the vital goods they need at the right prices. The will continue to do this and kill dollar dominance.

Theres no other choice or enter an inflationary spiral.

Early replies (first 3)

62488083
how does this play out in 20 years? half the countries buy using Yuan? US goes back to manufacturing cuz dollar falls? Americans finally lose weight?

62488086
>>62488026
I thought Milei was anti-Chinese?

62488137
>Argentine peso devalues to zimbabwe-tier levels
>Hard for businesses to even buy USD because the market is so shallow and the currency so unwanted price discovery becomes tricky
>Milei's lolbertarian stance does little to appease markets, forex remains tightly regulated to avoid massive capital flights
>country with almost no industry or advanced services to export
>USD reserves run dry
>Great opportunity for China to dump it's surplus production, will probably be selling shit to Argentina at a loss in a government-set artificial exchange rate just as they do with Veneuela and African shitholes that struggle to access USD
>brown thirdie posts his paid shilling painting this as a massive victory for china and a sign of the dollar collapsing
We should have flags on /biz/. I'd call you a chink but I don't think chinks can even access this site.
>As I was saying yesterday.
Your thread died within 24hs on one of the slowest boards on this site. That should tell you something. Fuck off paid brown tankie.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62499648
>>62499351
Do the math. Assumptions: current trends in Federal spending continue. Current trends in Federal revenue continue. Current trends in interest rates continue. One third of very low interest US treasury paper rolls over this year into much higher rates. You don't even have to speculate that current holders of treasuries will shy away as the end approaches or that Federal revenue is going to drop as the recession continues. MMT is in its death spiral.

Who are you going to shoot? Going to nuke China? The US military can't even intimidate Iran. Killing people can only delay but never defy the laws of economics.

62499671
>>62499648
How about you do some math here. Do you see the number on the left side of this graph? You’re saying that number will be 100+ in ten years. Does that look right to you?

62499676
>>62499648
And yes, to answer your second question. The US will flip out and bomb the entire planet before they relinquish their role and settle into total economic collapse. If you really believe that’s not a threat at all, more power to you.

62499873
>>62499628
>Qiushi, an official publication of the Communist Party, recently shared excerpts from a hitherto-unpublished 2024 speech by Xi to officials.
>2024 speech by Xi
so, years ago. it still hasn't happened.

>My bags are in picrel.
I only see gold and guns there. 0 yuans.
so you don't put your money where your mouth is.

62499920
I don't know why 4chan hasnt ip range banned anyone located in China yet but until they do we're going to get more threads full of lies like this one.

OP I hope you can feed your family with that yuan you get for posting this. To everyone else in the world its completely valueless.

62499930
>>62495485
1. Argentina has the sixth largest Jewish community
2. Argentina made plans to accommodate 300k Israeli refugees of war
3. Mekorot, a company that supplies 90% of the drinkable water in Israel, is present in Argentina
4. Wildfires in Patagonia at the end of 2025 and beginning of 2026, thought to be started by Israeli tourists, at the same time Milei modifies a law that permits foreigners to buy land
5. Milei's first visit abroad as president was Chabad Lubavitch World Headquarters in Brooklyn, the same place as the tunnel incident

62502541
>>62495499
Checked
They are being saved in one regard, only to have their entire future in peril of being sold out
They are in the midst of rearranging the state as per the usual faustian covenant

62502546
>>62498057
China banned mining.

62502583
>>62488026
The Grail moves ever westward.

62502597
>>62498284
Minimum 60%

62502626
>>62488026
America focused on zero sum parasite bullshit economics while China focused on production of real value that enriched the whole. China won

62502627
>>62495485
They have been seen starting fires on the Patagonia since 2012. Every single time a fire starts, turns out a group of Israeli "tourists" are seen on restricted areas of the native forest. They are demons.
>Why are they burning it tho?
Because Milei got passed a really convenient law that lets foreign entities buy native forest lands, 5 years after a natural disaster like a forest fire. Kast is pushing the exact same law among other laws that remove the safeguards.

62502632
>>62488083
America because an irrelevant welfare state while China becomes the main economic hub of the world

62502636
>>62488026
>What can the US do?
Have our leader shit himself and cry on twitter as the IMF does everything behind the scenes

62502644
>>62488083
>how does this play out in 20 years?
It doesn't, the Yuan is a fixed monopoly money. Granted, so is the US, but the reason the dollar became the trade currency was because the Fed was open about how it does business and where its bookkeeping lays.
It's only entering this period of the Yuan looking like a more attractive reason because our leadership is batshit retarded and has been effectively flushing its reputation down the drain. Mostly either at the behest of two consecutive presidencies ran by two separate senile old men who allowed anyone with their cell phone number to print infinite dollars for pet projects, or multiple banks and payment processors who decided that some dollars are more equal than others. Both of which defeat the purpose of having a reserve or trade currency, the transparency is shattered.

In twenty years those old men will be dead, we'll get at least one sane presidency who sets the fed straight and fires all of the yes-men and nepo hires, and we'll be back to normalcy of the Dollar being the reserve currency.

62502651
>>62502632
America will never be an irrelevant welfare state but the Dollar could further get shat on by ancient boomers who think chancing paying America's interest off on its debt for political plays is a smart thing to do. Nobody trusted the Yuan previously because it was clearly being manipulated by all metrics, when the dollar and yuan are both being manipulated by nepotistic retards, what difference does it make?

62502715
>>62496111
So they only needed to use 760 million Yuan in the new credit swap with the Chinese.

62502728
>>62499671
>Standards used to indicate total physical debt to GDP as an indicator of financial health
Let’s move the goal post and now only measure interest compared to GDP…

62502826
>>62499648
>Assumptions: current trends in Federal spending continue.
This is only happening because a cult decided to elect a boomer retard who has made it his life's goal to give as much money as possible to Israel. It won't continue, it can't.

62502927
>>62502541
unz.com/article/mileis-austrian-scam-by-the-numbers/
He's actually yet another shitty president. Nothing has changed besides who gets to fuck Argentina in the ass. Before it was China, now it's the US and Israel.

62503750
>>62502728
I didn’t move shit. He is the one who said interest on debt would exceed GDP. I posted a graph on what the interest on debt, as a percentage, looks like over time. What do you want?

62504238
>>62488026
do you guys think the angry replies every single thread that mentions "china" or "chinese" gets are NSA/GCHQ bots?

62504298
>>62502644
The Fed's would rather JFK that president than give up the power they have.

62504502
>>62488137
>Your thread died within 24hs on one of the slowest boards on this site. That should tell you something. Fuck off paid brown tankie.
kek spot on anon. He'll keep spamming

62504669
>>62497725
>I still don't understand how being a "global reserve currency" brings any benefit to me or the country
>>62498292
>It soaks up currency so the government/banks can create and spend massive quantities of new currency with minimal inflation
interesting
how is this not a ponzi scheme again?

62505167
>>62493633
>The solution is that the government buys my bags

62505377
>>62502651
>America will never be an irrelevant welfare state
Pure delusion.
Demographics is destiny. You are haunted by these words.

62505440
>>62505377
If demographics are destiny, then China is already, and will always be, a welfare state money-sink, you dumb fucking nigger.

62505448
>>62488137
They ree'd because he spoke the truth.

62505454
>>62488151
>INCREASINGLY BROWN!
>says the thirdie brownoid coping about China, a largely brownoid shithole

item.title: Why is there so much negativity surrounding the UK? — 126 replies — 12.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why is there so much negativity surrounding the UK?

Open thread • Replies: 126 • Updated: 2026-07-21 10:21 UTC

OP

Every time I see the UK mentioned here, it is always in a negative light.

It is always
>In the USA, wages are better!
>In Europe, houses are cheaper!
>The FTSE is underperforming!
>My taxes are too high!

There is never any mention of the fantastic benefits which come with life in the UK. The fantastic healthcare for minimal cost, the great education system available to everybody, the dynamic modern economy with many bustling sectors, and everything else.

Taxes are higher than the USA but they are lower than most of Europe and we still enjoy fantastic public services whereas in America there are no public services or safety nets.

Not to mention the things you cannot measure. Being able to walk the streets in safety without fear of gun violence and gangs. Enjoying the fantastic beautiful nature and gardens. Living in the historical majesty and balancing that with modern cosmopolitan qualities.

The UK might not be the best place to become rich but nobody is poor here and it is very easy to enjoy life if you have goals beyond the number in your bank account.

Early replies (first 3)

62481973
>>62481958
the problem is that its being filled with immigrants who are living off tax payers money
thats the gist of why everyone is so pissed off here

62481986
>>62481973
So just right wing racebaiting?

No, I think it runs deeper than that. Most people have not personally had negative experiences with migrants, and reading the Daily Mail does not count.

I am trying to angle from a financial perspective too. People talk about the UK like it is a poor country but it is one of the richest countries on the planet. I think perhaps they are just spoiled and do not know what poor countries are really like. I blame social media.

62481994
>>62481958
>fantastic healthcare for minimal cost
my nan lived in birmingham and she came down with leukaemia and was gone within a couple of months. She never even got to see a doctor because the muslim immigrants were getting seen first. if i had something to lose i wouldnt even dare post this for fear of legal reprimand.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62492845
>>62492526
I live in a very expensive area created by corrupt political nepo insiders for corrupt political nepo insiders. Everybody has 2-3 newest Audi or mercedes SUVs and several millions in the bank. All the houses are 3,000+ square feet and have gardens. But not me, I'm an outsider here, and everybody knows that because they all know each other and that I'm not part of their club. All the neighbors are professional dogshit cunt parasites. So yeah you live in a better place.

62492892
>>62490838
>and could carry a firearm or knife

Love it how you're so compelled to mention this but are too afraid to use them for real because you'll be locked up.

Feel free to use it in a school or mall though. Seems like the average American pastime.

62492960
>>62492845
why would you move there? Sounds stupid

62493072
>>62481958
>Being able to walk the streets in safety without fear of gun violence and gangs.
You can neither walk nor talk safely.
It's a beautiful country, it WAS a nice culture otherwise.
Now, if you have a daughter, or are a fuckable woman, you will get raped if not tortured by some gang, if you complain you will be arrested for racism, if you protest you will get beaten by the same worthless bobbies who refused to help, and it's all part of the meanest large scale society destuction, ethnic replacement, power grab and money grab back to feudalism ever in European history.
The economy is not better.

62493208
>>62492960
Because I'm a poorfag retard, it's not my place and I can live here for free.

62493518
>>62493072
what a load of tripe. 'Pakistani grooming gangs' weren't actually abducting and raping women you stupid retard. They were grooming them

62493619
>>62493518
even if that isn't a lie, "oh jeez, that's so much better, thanks!". you fucking clown, kys

62493666
>>62481958
if it's so great, stay there. stop running around and shitting everywhere. you flag is gay, and youor people are ugly af

62493751
>>62490585
>97% white
If you think it will stay that way in the next 20 years, you're delusional.
>>62482110

62493775
>>62481958
Because it run by Israel and occupied by Palestine

62493802
>>62481958
>Why is there so much negativity surrounding the UK?
out of the starmer frying pan into the burnham fire

62493836
>>62481958

62493843
>>62493751
do you think where you live will stay the same for 20 years too?

62493991
>>62493843
No, but that's completely beside the point because I wasn't the one bragging about living in some ethno state paradise.

62494575
>>62482009
This is an unacceptable post and the police have been informed.

62494624
Slimes abducted, raped, tortured and had dogs rape 250k British girls. If you think this is ok, you are a pedo globalist, a Jew, or a pedo globalist Jew.

62495552
>>62493802
>46 years of capitalist exploitation
>widely accepted that the country has declined since then
>somehow, this is not capitalisms fault
>in fact, it's socialisms fault
>somehow
>even though the nordic countries have done really well under socialism
>and america is a warzone full of drugs and homeless people
Yes, what we need is MORE corporate exploitation. That wealth is just about to trickle down! We have been waiting since *checks notes* Reagan but it's just about to happen!

62495765
>>62481958
Uk is hell on earth. 2nd worst country in the world right after india

62495935
>>62482008
>>62482025
>>62484965
Lmao. The second the numbers look bad, suddenly metrics don't matter.

GDP per capita. Median income. Salaries. Productivity. They're all "bad metrics" now.

The nice thing about GDP, salary, height, BMI, IQ tests, or any other quantitative measure is that the number still exists whether it makes you seethe or not.

Our poorest state is richer than your entire country on a per-person basis. Your doctors earn what our gas station managers make. Kneel.

62497286
>>62483303
Proportionality. Whites are still the majority. As it goes down, it'll become less sustainable, until it implodes.

62497297
>>62495552
>>even though the nordic countries have done really well under socialism
In what world are the nordic countries socialist? Are you retarded?

62497683
>>62481986
your country is being taken over by muslims. your women are raped en masse and you're worried about "right wingers". You are a weak man.

62500631
>>62497683
Last time right wingers took over a major country the world erupted in flames and global war. Muslims have never done that so yes I am more concerned about right wing extremism than a religion.

62502601
>>62500631
>just nonstop wrong direction brained bullshit
Holy shit open a history book made before the last 20 years. Any single one will do

62502606
>>62481958
The UK is a great country ran by absolute fucktarded cretins, ancient boomers, and fuck-you-got-mine politicians and royalty who are one foot out the door on dumping everything and moving to their private island.

If you could take the UK but execute all of its leadership, starting over from scratch, you'd have another world superpower. It's the nation that killed the goose who laid golden eggs because it wasn't laying diverse golden eggs.

62502616
>>62481986
>So just right wing racebaiting?
No he has a point, those immigrants has to be paid for by someone, and while a few are fine- there come a breaking point where social services cannot sustain a large number of them while also being functional, and that number is inversely correlated to how many social services the native population receives. A well-cared for native population with migrants dumped on them will find themselves incapable of fielding a diverse array of social services.

Those social services are the glue that keep nations from becoming third world tier, among other factors. A nation needs to be able to have modern public infrastructure, education, health care, housing, transportation, utilities, welfare, unemployment. This is why every business, despite their bluster, doesn't actually move their corporate HQs and operations to nations where labor is extremely cheap like India or Africa: They still need a nation that is capable of filling in the gaps these corporations won't do themselves like have safe roads and reliable energy.

The folly of using mass migration to fix population pyramid woes is that somebody has to pay for someone who is fresh off the boat, and it could realistically never be the first generation or even statistically the second generation migrant. It's great for companies who want to bust all their unions, though.

62502630
>>62482025
>GDP is not a very good metric for this.
It's actually an excellent metric for this: Maybe it's not proof of quality of life, but it's proof that the direction the leadership has chosen for business and economy has been a complete wrong turn and only a U-turn could ever fix the country. Unfortunately, there is no such thing as a leadership that has ever chosen to 'go back'. Those villas and quiet farms are quiet for a reason: Everyone has to move someplace else to work.

62502642
Both Indians and Russians seethe about Britain. They also have backup to a lesser extent from Argentinians.

62502696
>>62481958
Oy! That’s not what a free country looks like m8

62504870
>>62495935
>falls over
>dislocates a bone
>calls an ambulance
>$200.000 debt
Freedom, right?

>anon can you... whenever YOU get a chance
>act like if they're saying it nicely that makes it better
>one woman literally staring at instagram on her phone at work
>quit within a week

Early replies (first 3)

62503134
>>62503128
Meanwhile Jodie Johnson got paid to have sex with milfs while you worked there.

62503144
>women generally allergic to STEM
>one exception
>it’s cooking science

62503154
>>62503128
>anon can you carry this thing that weighs a metric ton outside?
>No
wow so hard

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62503160
>>62503128
Typical.

>>62503134
Correct.

>>62503144
Lol.

>>62503154
/thread

62503172
>>62503154
>No
>ohhh whats wrong anon? Why aren't you a team player?

62503192
>>62503144
You forgot biology too
That field is going to be the new psych with degree inflation.

62503209
>>62503128
Perfect job if some of them put out and you can slack off yourself most of the day

62503237
>>62503128
>anon can you carry this thing that weighs a metric ton outside?
yeah sure *stretch a 1 hour job into 8 hours*
>anon can you do this other physical dirty thing?
yeah sure *stretch a 1 hour job into 8 hours*
>anon can you... whenever YOU get a chance
yeah sure *stretch a 1 hour job into 8 hours*

you failed the IQ test.

62503540
>>62503128
>>one woman literally staring at instagram on her phone at work
All that stuff works without her, only occasionally checking that experiments (or whatever you do there) function correctly. What is she expected to do? Trading shitcoins?

62503561
>>62503172
>I am. Why don't you do it, cunt?

62503609
>>62503128
> literally nothing getting done
Start hiring younger very beautiful woman not grandma.

62503675
>>62503128
I used to be an attorney in a government office. Secretaries always came to me to move heavy file cabinets and shit. I was happy to do it. Get out from behind my desk and move a bit. I liked the fact that when the girls needed a man to do something they always said "ask Anon". And getting six figures to move furniture is still six figures.

62503692
>>62503209
This is embarrassing. The olympics is turbo gay.

62503721
>>62503128
Where?

62503725
>>62503675
bending over for women is fundamentally gay

62503847
>>62503128
>>80% female
Every office business is like this and I'm confused why there aren't massive lawsuits over it.

62503878
>>62503725
Helping others isn't gay, anon. Unless you are helping them by sucking their dicks. Then it is kind of gay.

62503895
>>62503128
My gf said when she was in college almost every girl she met was seeing multiple guys at the same time. You just don't call one your boyfriend and you're fine for them

62503998
>>62503878
wtf nigga that's hella gay

62506159
>>62503128
>anon can you carry this thing that weighs a metric ton outside?
>anon can you do this other physical dirty thing?
>anon can you... whenever YOU get a chance
>act like if they're saying it nicely that makes it better
It really does make it better, GIWIWY (God I wish I was you). I am literally genetically crafted to be a simp. I just want to PROOOOOVIDE VGH

item.title: ANOTHER RED OPEN WHAT THE FUCK??? THIS SHIT IS FUCKING RIGGED — 48 replies — 9.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
ANOTHER RED OPEN WHAT THE FUCK??? THIS SHIT IS FUCKING RIGGED

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-07-21 15:16 UTC

OP

ANOTHER RED OPEN

WHAT THE FUCK??? THIS SHIT IS FUCKING RIGGED

Early replies (first 3)

62502280
>>62502268
4% circulating shitcoin

62502290
>>62502268
4%

62502294
this stock won't be fifty cents by the time all the supply is unlocked

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62502598
Elon will build a billion robots bro.

62502634
Hodl.
Moon next year
Mars by 2028
Colony set up fully by 2030
1 million Mars colonist by 2035
Asteroid mining on Mars by 2040
Space elevators to orbit by 2045 thus not needing rockets anymore, and Elon is gonna have the monopoly on them

Just a few shares of SPCX will literally make you a billionaire by 2050. If you're not buying or hodl you are NGMI

62502638
>>62502407
It's all gonna happen and you're gonna still be poor and me rich

62502660
>>62502268
My fucking sides are exploding FUCKING TOPKEK!

62502663
>>62502268
>He bought Musk's pyramid scheme because "I CAN TRUST SPACEX ITS RAN BY THE RICHEST MAN ON EARTH"

today, anon learns why he's the richest man on Earth

62502677
>>62502268
It’s a shitcoin

62502681
How does this company make money?

62502709
>>62502681
>make money?
For real tho, they cook the books.
Starlink 'makes a profit' because SpaceX write off it's (v. expensive) launch costs.

62502747
>>62502677
>It’s a shitcoin

indeed
we may get in under 50

62502750
>>62502681
>How does this company make money?
how does Tesla makes anything but is worth more the GM, VW, Toyota, Mercedes, BMW, Honda and so on

62502759
this stock is cursed, abandon the ship

62502803
>>62502750
Tesla 'makes money' because at present artificially insulated (in US) from competition from chinks etc. by anti-competitive regulation. But even then they are still floundering, aging lineup and nothing in the pipeline but vaporware and Yet Moar! Musk Bullshit

62502861
>>62502268
don't worry it will go up again within the fortnight

62502962
SpaceX is just the privatization of the American space program into private jewish hands.

62502993
>>62502268
wait until earnings call.

How far does this need to fall before Elon stops being a Trillionaire?

62503008
>>62502993
>wait until earnings call.
will it moon then? i at least dont want to sell at a loss

62503012
lmao SpaceX niggers are literally exit liquidity for twitter

62503023
>>62503008
you dont even know what you're holding or why you're holding it? lmao

62503306
119.75 was the absolute floor, congrats to everyone who had the balls to buy

62503608
>>62503306
Ok, now consider this: 4%

62503620
>>62503008

Ladies (trannies) and Gentlemen, I give you, The Eternal Bagholder.

62503629
>>62503608
I’m already up 4 percent pussy

Stay poor

62503633
>>62502268
>sub triple digits by EOW
farewell jeetx

62505283
>>62502638
AGI has nearly happened. Data centers in space are retarded. Mars colonies are retarded. The only thing that will ever colonize other planets is machines and the organisms they designed. A cure for cancer creates hypercompetition with designer organisms. Even if you'd troon out to become a trans human, you'd succumb quickly to this competitive pressure.

62505353
+4.5%
IT'S MOONING!

62505525
We are back, bros

62505535
>>62502344
My dad told me 109 so I wouldn't buy before there.

62505566
>he thought the elites would let him get rich off their laundering scheme
lol, lmao

62505589
>>62502280
LMFAO.

>Space mining
It still doesn't exist
>AI in space
Still none and who knows how long until then
>Company has no profit
Negative P/E, no one with 2 braincells invest in that.
>China has reusable rockets
It's going to lose to China
>Might fuse with Tesla
Another shit company that lost against China
>Elon is its CEO
Are you really going to invest in market manipulator conman?

62505612
+8% ACCEPTED
